data.body:
SC4 naming deviations formally accepted:

1. scripts/ticket_reducer/ vs scripts/ticket/: The intended scripts/ticket/ path conflicts with the existing 'ticket' shell script (the DSO CLI dispatcher). Creating a directory at that path fails with 'File exists'. Story 4387-30cb corrected to ticket_reducer/ at implementation time. This deviation is accepted as a necessary path correction.

2. hooks/lib/*.sh without lib- prefix: Story 6cc1-c200 created merge-helpers.sh, validate-helpers.sh, validate-check-runners.sh, and validate-review-schemas.sh in hooks/lib/. These serve the shell utility extraction intent but without the lib- prefix. The naming deviation is accepted; the files are functionally correct.

SC4 acceptance rationale: both deviations were implementation-time corrections necessitated by real constraints (naming conflict, convention choice). The SC intent — domain-grouped subpackages — is fully met.
